\tzpentry{ID4386}{Phase Angle Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4386 introduces Phase Angle Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K_p(x_1,x_2;\theta_p) \equiv \Psi_p\bigl(s_1,\sigma_1;s_2,\sigma_2\bigr) \quad \text{with }x_i = h_{\sigma_i}(s_i), \end{equation}
